text.value:
DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcStaffCustomFieldsOptions t
INNER JOIN dbo.hcStaffCustomFields cf ON t.StaffCustomFieldId = cf.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cf.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

-- OptionValue path
INNER JOIN dbo.hcStaffCustomFieldOptionValues v ON v.OptionId = t.Id
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = v.StaffMemberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd2 ON tm.accountInfoId = atd2.AccountId
/**
WHERE
    (
        atd.AccountId IS NOT NULL
        OR atd2.AccountId IS NOT NULL
    )
    AND (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
**/
